offer: For property managers managing 5–15 properties, inefficient utility tracking causes high operational costs. We provide weekly utility usage reports instead of manual tracking of utility bills.
problem: High operational costs due to inefficient utility tracking.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users try weekly utility reports for 1-3 properties
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video on manual tracking
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
